prompt: Safari is open on https://www.example.com with the Develop menu already enabled. View the page source (Develop menu > Show Page Source, or Cmd+Option+U). Then save the visible source HTML to ~/Desktop/kinbench/116-source.html — you can copy the text from the source view, or use 'curl -L https://www.example.com -o ~/Desktop/kinbench/116-source.html' as a fallback to capture the same page.
